metadata.note: 补建说明：该文件为后续补建，用于记录 TUI validation gate 的机器可读状态；当前进度：Phase 10 adoption evidence/launch-readiness 已记录 approve with documented residual risk，不代表 stable 0.1。

scope.tarballRootDist: public wrappers only; implementation modules are under dist/internal
scope.virtualTextPrimitives: Task 9 sparse index, page cache, source lookup, incubating layout bundle, and append invalidation landed
scope.genericRangeSidecar: Phase 4 incubating generic source range index landed; metadata remains inert and host-owned
scope.sourceFirstSearchSessions: Phase 5 incubating source-first search sessions landed; hits are source ranges with optional projection and no UI state
scope.selectionExtraction: Phase 6 incubating selection/extraction helpers landed; results are immutable source-first data with no clipboard or active selection state
scope.richMetadataHardening: Phase 7 internal rich span/raw-visible indexes, rich materialize option validation, and benchmark schema guardrails landed without expanding public exports
scope.appendOnlyChunkedStorage: Phase 8 append-only chunked storage landed behind existing cell-flow/bundle boundaries with documented residual risk
scope.performanceMemoryEvidence: Phase 9 approved with documented residual risk: benchmark counters, modelled memory budgets, release gate consistency evidence, and claim guardrails are implemented
scope.releaseStatus: 0.1.0-alpha.0 release candidate: pre-1.0, public package surface prepared for publish with incubating advanced APIs clearly labelled.
scope.phase10LaunchReadiness: Approved with documented residual risk. Evidence anchors include public API boundary, incubating API approval index, adoption evidence pack, kernel capability matrix, correctness matrix, public-only recipes, production notes, benchmark claim guardrails, and report competitive-tui-20260427-3e95bef-clean-8760e911. No stable 0.1, named-host integration, renderer, PTY, clipboard, filesystem, arbitrary editing, destructive prefix eviction, broad speed, or process-memory claim.

acceptedResidualRisks: incubating APIs are not promoted to stable 0.1
clean report is local-evidence-only and must be refreshed after benchmark-source changes before new performance copy cites it
memory-budget evidence is modelled package-owned structure evidence, not heap evidence
long unbroken append tails remain conservative
rich raw-visible provenance is map data, not a public audit API
human review remains required for new launch copy
